products.title: Alek Sculpting Legging Black
products.description: Expertly crafted from a luxurious compact black jersey, the Alek legging is sculpting, refined and transitions perfectly from day to night. Wear back with the matching Vincent top to complete the look.

products.title: Thea Organic Cotton Gathered Sleeveless Top Black
products.description: The Thea gathered sleeveless top in black is the ultimate summer top. Crafted in 100% organic cotton this top features a beautiful gathered detail throughout the bodice and a low neckline. Delicate ties at the centre front and waist mean the top can be adjusted perfectly to suit the wearer. Our cotton is crisp and will last a lifetime. After which it is naturally degradeable.

products.title: Seren Bra Rust
products.description: The Seren Bra is crafted in silk satin and features a soft triangle cup. It has a gold clip fastening and adjusters on the strap for a comfortable fit.

products.title: Seren Pant Rust
products.description: The Seren Pant is crafted in silk satin and features a ruffle detail around the waist and leg.

products.title: Ceres Cotton Midi Dress Golden Yellow
products.description: Our Ceres midi dress is crafted from 100% Cotton and features a beautiful gathered detail throughout the bodice and low neckline. Delicate ties at the centre front and waist mean the dress can be adjusted to suit the wearer. A generously full circle skirt finishes off this versatile dress. As perfect for summer beach days as an evening occasion.

products.title: Remi Trouser Black
products.description: The relaxed proportions of the Remi Trouser create the ultimate modern trouser. Crafted in luxurious crinkle silk with a straight leg silhouette that falls beautifully at the hem. The trouser sits softly on the waist with delicate pleats adding subtle detail.
